title: bridge.hello response result
description: Engine reply to the handshake. Validates the `result` payload of the bridge.hello response. The session id assigned here is also echoed at the envelope level on subsequent messages.

sessionId.description: Session id assigned by the engine for this connection.

protocolVersion.description: Protocol version the engine selected from the client's offered protocolVersions.

server.description: Identity of the engine endpoint. Generic fields only; engine-specific identity stays in adapters.

engine.description: Optional generic engine identifier (free-form label, not a NorvesLib-specific type).

capabilities.description: Optional capability descriptors advertised by the engine. The authoritative list is also retrievable via bridge.getCapabilities.
